milestoneTitle: Phase M9.5b — Projects Finder as a full-page route. Added a "← Back to saved" link at top, a thin dot-separated step indicator (Describe · Capabilities · Path · Stack · Save) that scrolls to each section, and a Resume-draft banner surfaced whenever #projects/new is opened with an existing draft. "Start fresh" clears the draft + caps + textarea in one click. Collapsed the two finder-divider rows + examples + Mode B/C forks into a single <details> block ("Start from an example or a different mode…") that fades to 40% opacity once the user types in the describe field via :has(:not(:placeholder-shown)). clhub.v1.finderDraft schema extended from plain-string to { description, path?, updatedAt } — legacy strings auto-migrate on read. Save-form path radios persist their choice to the draft. On successful save, clearFinderDraft() + input + caps reset so the banner doesn't lie about stale work. Legacy .finder-divider CSS kept as dead code; cleanup pass after v0.7.0 stabilizes.
